introductionSomali: Unit-kan wuxuu barayaa homes, rooms, furniture, neighbourhoods, directions, place and movement prepositions, comparatives, superlatives, as-as, too/enough, one/ones, relative clauses, maps iyo fictional property information.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Noocyada guryaha iyo dhismayaasha waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Noocyada guryaha iyo dhismayaasha.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Types of Homes and Buildings grammar
grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa place descriptions iyo comparisons heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan description ama comparison leh context cad.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be/have + place or comparison detail.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Noocyada guryaha iyo dhismayaasha • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The fictional local guide identifies the House and explains its main use.
lines.somali: Hagaha deegaanka ee mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu tilmaamayaa House oo sharxayaa isticmaalkeeda ugu weyn.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Noocyada guryaha iyo dhismayaasha • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Noocyada guryaha iyo dhismayaasha, adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Noocyada guryaha iyo dhismayaasha, common collocations, grammar-ka lagama maarmaanka ah iyo isticmaalka place/comparison context.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Qolalka guriga waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Qolalka guriga.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa place descriptions iyo comparisons heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan description ama comparison leh context cad.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be/have + place or comparison detail.

positiveExamples.english: The example home includes a practical Living room beside another clearly labelled room.
positiveExamples.somali: Guriga tusaalaha ahi wuxuu leeyahay Living room wax-ku-ool ah oo ku xiga qol kale oo si cad loo magacaabay.

positiveExamples.english: The example home includes a practical Bedroom beside another clearly labelled room.
positiveExamples.somali: Guriga tusaalaha ahi wuxuu leeyahay Bedroom wax-ku-ool ah oo ku xiga qol kale oo si cad loo magacaabay.

positiveExamples.english: The example home includes a practical Kitchen beside another clearly labelled room.
positiveExamples.somali: Guriga tusaalaha ahi wuxuu leeyahay Kitchen wax-ku-ool ah oo ku xiga qol kale oo si cad loo magacaabay.

positiveExamples.english: The example home includes a practical Bathroom beside another clearly labelled room.
positiveExamples.somali: Guriga tusaalaha ahi wuxuu leeyahay Bathroom wax-ku-ool ah oo ku xiga qol kale oo si cad loo magacaabay.

positiveExamples.english: The example family usually eats together in the dining room.
positiveExamples.somali: Qoyska tusaalaha ahi badanaa wuxuu wada cunaa qolka cuntada.

positiveExamples.english: The example home includes a practical Hall beside another clearly labelled room.
positiveExamples.somali: Guriga tusaalaha ahi wuxuu leeyahay Hall wax-ku-ool ah oo ku xiga qol kale oo si cad loo magacaabay.

positiveExamples.english: Visitors must use the main entrance at the front of the fictional building.
positiveExamples.somali: Booqdayaashu waa inay isticmaalaan albaabka weyn ee ku yaal dhinaca hore ee dhismaha mala-awaalka ah.

positiveExamples.english: The apartment has a small balcony that looks over the fictional street.
positiveExamples.somali: Gurigu wuxuu leeyahay balakoon yar oo eegaya waddada mala-awaalka ah.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qolalka guriga • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The example home includes a practical Living room beside another clearly labelled room.
lines.somali: Guriga tusaalaha ahi wuxuu leeyahay Living room wax-ku-ool ah oo ku xiga qol kale oo si cad loo magacaabay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qolalka guriga • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Qolalka guriga, common collocations, grammar-ka lagama maarmaanka ah iyo isticmaalka place/comparison context.

quizQuestions.question: Dooro macnaha saxda ah ee “Living room”.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “qolka fadhiga”. Source: Qolalka guriga. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg xeerka iyo example-ka casharkan.

quizQuestions.question: Dooro macnaha saxda ah ee “Bedroom”.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “qolka jiifka”. Source: Qolalka guriga. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg xeerka iyo example-ka casharkan.

quizQuestions.question: Dooro macnaha saxda ah ee “Kitchen”.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “jikada”. Source: Qolalka guriga. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg xeerka iyo example-ka casharkan.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Alaabta guriga waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Alaabta guriga.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa place descriptions iyo comparisons heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan description ama comparison leh context cad.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be/have + place or comparison detail.

positiveExamples.english: The family placed the Sofa in a suitable room where it can be used safely.
positiveExamples.somali: Qoysku wuxuu Sofa dhigay qol ku habboon oo si ammaan ah loogu isticmaali karo.

positiveExamples.english: The family placed the Armchair in a suitable room where it can be used safely.
positiveExamples.somali: Qoysku wuxuu Armchair dhigay qol ku habboon oo si ammaan ah loogu isticmaali karo.

positiveExamples.english: The family placed the Table in a suitable room where it can be used safely.

positiveExamples.english: The family placed the Chair in a suitable room where it can be used safely.
positiveExamples.somali: Qoysku wuxuu Chair dhigay qol ku habboon oo si ammaan ah loogu isticmaali karo.

positiveExamples.english: The family placed the Bed in a suitable room where it can be used safely.
positiveExamples.somali: Qoysku wuxuu Bed dhigay qol ku habboon oo si ammaan ah loogu isticmaali karo.

positiveExamples.english: The wardrobe has enough space for all of her clothes.
positiveExamples.somali: Armaajada dharku waxay leedahay meel ku filan dhammaan dharkeeda.

positiveExamples.english: The family placed the Cupboard in a suitable room where it can be used safely.
positiveExamples.somali: Qoysku wuxuu Cupboard dhigay qol ku habboon oo si ammaan ah loogu isticmaali karo.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Alaabta guriga • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The family placed the Sofa in a suitable room where it can be used safely.
lines.somali: Qoysku wuxuu Sofa dhigay qol ku habboon oo si ammaan ah loogu isticmaali karo.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Alaabta guriga • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa place descriptions iyo comparisons heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan description ama comparison leh context cad.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be/have + place or comparison detail.

positiveExamples.english: The property description uses “Large” and gives a reason for that opinion.
positiveExamples.somali: Sharaxaadda gurigu waxay adeegsanaysaa “Large” oo sabab ka bixinaysa ra’yigaas.

positiveExamples.english: The property description uses “Small” and gives a reason for that opinion.
positiveExamples.somali: Sharaxaadda gurigu waxay adeegsanaysaa “Small” oo sabab ka bixinaysa ra’yigaas.

positiveExamples.english: The property description uses “Comfortable” and gives a reason for that opinion.

positiveExamples.english: The property description uses “Dark” and gives a reason for that opinion.
positiveExamples.somali: Sharaxaadda gurigu waxay adeegsanaysaa “Dark” oo sabab ka bixinaysa ra’yigaas.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Sharaxaadda guri • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The property description uses “Large” and gives a reason for that opinion.
lines.somali: Sharaxaadda gurigu waxay adeegsanaysaa “Large” oo sabab ka bixinaysa ra’yigaas.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Sharaxaadda guri • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.titleEnglish: There Is and There Are Review
lessons.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista There Is iyo There Are
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dib-u-eegista There Is iyo There Are waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Dib-u-eegista There Is iyo There Are.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: place word or phrase • There Is and There Are Review • neutral
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The description uses “There is” before giving a clear detail about the fictional neighbourhood.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Sharaxaadu waxay “There is” adeegsanaysaa kahor faahfaahin cad oo ku saabsan xaafadda mala-awaalka ah.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Topic: Dib-u-eegista There Is iyo There Are. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa common collocation iyo place/comparison context dabiici ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: There Is and There Are Review grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Dib-u-eegista There Is iyo There Are
grammar.explanationSomali: There is + singular/uncountable; there are + plural. Some waxaa badan positive, any-na questions iyo negative.
grammar.rule: There is + singular/uncountable; there are + plural. Some waxaa badan positive, any-na questions iyo negative.
grammar.sentenceStructure: There is/are + noun + place detail.

positiveExamples.english: The description uses “There is” before giving a clear detail about the fictional neighbourhood.
positiveExamples.somali: Sharaxaadu waxay “There is” adeegsanaysaa kahor faahfaahin cad oo ku saabsan xaafadda mala-awaalka ah.

positiveExamples.somali: Sharaxaadu waxay “Any parks” adeegsanaysaa kahor faahfaahin cad oo ku saabsan xaafadda mala-awaalka ah.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista There Is iyo There Are • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The description uses “There is” before giving a clear detail about the fictional neighbourhood.
lines.somali: Sharaxaadu waxay “There is” adeegsanaysaa kahor faahfaahin cad oo ku saabsan xaafadda mala-awaalka ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista There Is iyo There Are • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa place descriptions iyo comparisons heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan description ama comparison leh context cad.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be/have + place or comparison detail.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional Supermarket provides a useful local service within walking distance of the apartment.
positiveExamples.somali: Supermarket-ga mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu bixiyaa adeeg deegaan oo guriga lug looga gaari karo.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional Market provides a useful local service within walking distance of the apartment.
positiveExamples.somali: Market-ga mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu bixiyaa adeeg deegaan oo guriga lug looga gaari karo.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional Cash machine provides a useful local service within walking distance of the apartment.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Goobaha xaafadda • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The fictional Supermarket provides a useful local service within walking distance of the apartment.
lines.somali: Supermarket-ga mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu bixiyaa adeeg deegaan oo guriga lug looga gaari karo.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Goobaha xaafadda • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Sharaxaadda xaafad waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Sharaxaadda xaafad.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa place descriptions iyo comparisons heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan description ama comparison leh context cad.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be/have + place or comparison detail.

positiveExamples.english: Our neighbourhood is quiet, and most daily services are within walking distance.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaafaddeennu waa deggan tahay, adeegyada maalinlaha ah intooda badanna lug ayaa lagu gaari karaa.

positiveExamples.english: The local guide uses “Neighbour” to describe the atmosphere or convenience of the fictional area.
positiveExamples.somali: Hagaha deegaanku wuxuu “Neighbour” u adeegsadaa jawiga ama ku habboonaanta degaanka mala-awaalka ah.

positiveExamples.english: The local guide uses “Peaceful” to describe the atmosphere or convenience of the fictional area.
positiveExamples.somali: Hagaha deegaanku wuxuu “Peaceful” u adeegsadaa jawiga ama ku habboonaanta degaanka mala-awaalka ah.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Sharaxaadda xaafad • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Our neighbourhood is quiet, and most daily services are within walking distance.
lines.somali: Xaafaddeennu waa deggan tahay, adeegyada maalinlaha ah intooda badanna lug ayaa lagu gaari karaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Sharaxaadda xaafad • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Magaalada iyo miyiga waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Magaalada iyo miyiga.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa place descriptions iyo comparisons heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan description ama comparison leh context cad.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be/have + place or comparison detail.

positiveExamples.english: The comparison explains how the City differs from another type of fictional area.
positiveExamples.somali: Isbarbardhiggu wuxuu sharxayaa sida City uga duwan yahay nooc kale oo deegaan mala-awaal ah.

positiveExamples.english: The comparison explains how the Suburb differs from another type of fictional area.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Magaalada iyo miyiga • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The comparison explains how the City differs from another type of fictional area.
lines.somali: Isbarbardhiggu wuxuu sharxayaa sida City uga duwan yahay nooc kale oo deegaan mala-awaal ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Magaalada iyo miyiga • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play A2 ah oo ku saabsan Magaalada iyo miyiga, kuna dar location ama comparison detail cad.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Magaalada iyo miyiga, adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Magaalada iyo miyiga, common collocations, grammar-ka lagama maarmaanka ah iyo isticmaalka place/comparison context.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Meeleeyayaasha goobta waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Meeleeyayaasha goobta.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Meeleeyayaasha goobta • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The map places the library In the fictional bank so learners can locate it clearly.
lines.somali: Khariidaddu waxay maktabadda dhigaysaa In bangiga mala-awaalka ah si ardaydu si cad u helaan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Meeleeyayaasha goobta • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play A2 ah oo ku saabsan Meeleeyayaasha goobta, kuna dar location ama comparison detail cad.

lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Meeleeyayaasha goobta, common collocations, grammar-ka lagama maarmaanka ah iyo isticmaalka place/comparison context.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bixinta tilmaamaha jidka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Bixinta tilmaamaha jidka.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa place descriptions iyo comparisons heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan description ama comparison leh context cad.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be/have + place or comparison detail.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Fictional walking route • start • landmarks • destination • 8 minutes

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.english: Start at the fictional community centre on Market Road.
lines.somali: Ka bilow xarunta bulshada ee mala-awaalka ah ee Market Road.

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.english: Go straight along Market Road and walk past the bank.
lines.somali: Toos u raac Market Road oo dhaaf bangiga.

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.english: Take the second left after the bakery.
lines.somali: Leexashada labaad bidix u qaado foornada kadib.

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.english: The library is on your right, opposite the park.
lines.somali: Maktabaddu waxay ku taal midigtaada, beerta nasashada ka soo horjeedkeeda.

lines.speaker: Time
lines.english: The fictional walk takes about eight minutes.
lines.somali: Socodka mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu qaataa qiyaastii siddeed daqiiqo.

dialogues.titleSomali: Bixinta tilmaamaha jidka • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The directions dialogue uses “Go straight” with a starting point, landmark, and fictional destination.
lines.somali: Wada hadalka jidku wuxuu “Go straight” la adeegsanayaa bilow, calaamad goobeed iyo destination mala-awaal ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Bixinta tilmaamaha jidka • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Weydiinta jidka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Weydiinta jidka.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa place descriptions iyo comparisons heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan description ama comparison leh context cad.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be/have + place or comparison detail.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Weydiinta jidka • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The directions dialogue uses “How can I get to” with a starting point, landmark, and fictional destination.
lines.somali: Wada hadalka jidku wuxuu “How can I get to” la adeegsanayaa bilow, calaamad goobeed iyo destination mala-awaal ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Weydiinta jidka • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play A2 ah oo ku saabsan Weydiinta jidka, kuna dar location ama comparison detail cad.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Weydiinta jidka, adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Weydiinta jidka, common collocations, grammar-ka lagama maarmaanka ah iyo isticmaalka place/comparison context.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Meeleeyayaasha dhaqdhaqaaqa waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Meeleeyayaasha dhaqdhaqaaqa.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Movement prepositions waxay sharxaan jihada ama waddada dhaqdhaqaaqa.
grammar.rule: Movement prepositions waxay sharxaan jihada ama waddada dhaqdhaqaaqa.
grammar.sentenceStructure: movement verb + preposition + place.

positiveExamples.english: The walker moves To the fictional landmark while following the marked route.
positiveExamples.somali: Qofka lugaynayaa wuxuu To calaamadda goobeed ee mala-awaalka ah isagoo raacaya jidka calaamadsan.

positiveExamples.english: The walker moves From the fictional landmark while following the marked route.
positiveExamples.somali: Qofka lugaynayaa wuxuu From calaamadda goobeed ee mala-awaalka ah isagoo raacaya jidka calaamadsan.

positiveExamples.english: The walker moves Into the fictional landmark while following the marked route.
positiveExamples.somali: Qofka lugaynayaa wuxuu Into calaamadda goobeed ee mala-awaalka ah isagoo raacaya jidka calaamadsan.

positiveExamples.english: The walker moves Out of the fictional landmark while following the marked route.
positiveExamples.somali: Qofka lugaynayaa wuxuu Out of calaamadda goobeed ee mala-awaalka ah isagoo raacaya jidka calaamadsan.

positiveExamples.english: Go through the main entrance and turn left beside reception.
positiveExamples.somali: Ka gal albaabka weyn oo bidix uga leexo soo-dhoweynta agteeda.

positiveExamples.english: Walk across the road at the marked pedestrian crossing.
positiveExamples.somali: Waddada kaga gudub meesha calaamadsan ee dadka lugaynaya.

positiveExamples.english: Walk along the fictional River Road until you reach the library.
positiveExamples.somali: Raac River Road-ka mala-awaalka ah ilaa aad ka gaarto maktabadda.

positiveExamples.english: The walker moves Past the fictional landmark while following the marked route.
positiveExamples.somali: Qofka lugaynayaa wuxuu Past calaamadda goobeed ee mala-awaalka ah isagoo raacaya jidka calaamadsan.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Meeleeyayaasha dhaqdhaqaaqa • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The walker moves To the fictional landmark while following the marked route.
lines.somali: Qofka lugaynayaa wuxuu To calaamadda goobeed ee mala-awaalka ah isagoo raacaya jidka calaamadsan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Meeleeyayaasha dhaqdhaqaaqa • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.speakingPractice: Isticmaal across, through, along iyo past afar tilmaamood.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Meeleeyayaasha dhaqdhaqaaqa, adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Meeleeyayaasha dhaqdhaqaaqa, common collocations, grammar-ka lagama maarmaanka ah iyo isticmaalka place/comparison context.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Masaafada iyo goobta waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Masaafada iyo goobta.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: How far wuxuu weydiiyaa masaafad; How long does it take wuxuu weydiiyaa muddada safarka.
grammar.rule: How far wuxuu weydiiyaa masaafad; How long does it take wuxuu weydiiyaa muddada safarka.
grammar.sentenceStructure: How far is A from B?; How long does it take?

positiveExamples.english: The guide uses Close when explaining the exact location and physical distance.
positiveExamples.somali: Haguhu wuxuu Close adeegsadaa marka uu sharxayo goobta saxda ah iyo masaafadda jireed.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Masaafada iyo goobta • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The guide uses Close when explaining the exact location and physical distance.
lines.somali: Haguhu wuxuu Close adeegsadaa marka uu sharxayo goobta saxda ah iyo masaafadda jireed.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Masaafada iyo goobta • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play A2 ah oo ku saabsan Masaafada iyo goobta, kuna dar location ama comparison detail cad.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Masaafada iyo goobta, adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Masaafada iyo goobta, common collocations, grammar-ka lagama maarmaanka ah iyo isticmaalka place/comparison context.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dib-u-eegista Comparative Adjectives waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Dib-u-eegista Comparative Adjectives.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Comparative-ku wuxuu isbarbardhigaa laba shay: short adjective + -er ama more + long adjective; irregular better/worse.
grammar.rule: Comparative-ku wuxuu isbarbardhigaa laba shay: short adjective + -er ama more + long adjective; irregular better/worse.
grammar.sentenceStructure: A + be + comparative + than + B.

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista Comparative Adjectives • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The comparison uses “Smaller” to compare fictional homes with clear price, size, and location data.
lines.somali: Isbarbardhiggu wuxuu “Smaller” ku barbar dhigaa guryo mala-awaal ah oo leh qiime, cabbir iyo goob cad.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista Comparative Adjectives • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dib-u-eegista Superlative Adjectives waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Dib-u-eegista Superlative Adjectives.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Superlative-ku wuxuu hal shay la barbar dhigaa koox; badanaa the ayuu qaataa.
grammar.rule: Superlative-ku wuxuu hal shay la barbar dhigaa koox; badanaa the ayuu qaataa.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be + the + superlative + in/of group.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista Superlative Adjectives • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The comparison uses “The smallest” to compare fictional homes with clear price, size, and location data.
lines.somali: Isbarbardhiggu wuxuu “The smallest” ku barbar dhigaa guryo mala-awaal ah oo leh qiime, cabbir iyo goob cad.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista Superlative Adjectives • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Isbarbardhigga isku heerka ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Isbarbardhigga isku heerka ah.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: As + adjective + as = isku heer; not as + adjective + as = midka koowaad heerkaas ma gaarin.
grammar.rule: As + adjective + as = isku heer; not as + adjective + as = midka koowaad heerkaas ma gaarin.
grammar.sentenceStructure: A + be + (not) as + adjective + as + B.

dialogues.titleSomali: Isbarbardhigga isku heerka ah • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The comparison uses “As large as” to compare fictional homes with clear price, size, and location data.
lines.somali: Isbarbardhiggu wuxuu “As large as” ku barbar dhigaa guryo mala-awaal ah oo leh qiime, cabbir iyo goob cad.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Isbarbardhigga isku heerka ah • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dib-u-eegista Too iyo Enough waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Dib-u-eegista Too iyo Enough.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Too + adjective; adjective + enough; enough + noun; not enough + noun.
grammar.rule: Too + adjective; adjective + enough; enough + noun; not enough + noun.
grammar.sentenceStructure: too + adjective; adjective + enough; enough/not enough + noun.

Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dib-u-eegista One iyo Ones waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Dib-u-eegista One iyo Ones.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: One wuxuu beddelaa singular countable noun; ones wuxuu beddelaa plural countable nouns.
grammar.rule: One wuxuu beddelaa singular countable noun; ones wuxuu beddelaa plural countable nouns.
grammar.sentenceStructure: adjective + one/ones.

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista One iyo Ones • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The property choice uses “The quieter one” to avoid repeating a countable noun or to judge suitability.
lines.somali: Doorashada gurigu waxay “The quieter one” u adeegsanaysaa ka fogaanshaha ku celinta magac la tirin karo ama qiimaynta ku filnaanta.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista One iyo Ones • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.titleEnglish: Relative Clauses With Who, Which and That
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Who, Which iyo That waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Who, Which iyo That.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Relative Clauses With Who, Which and That grammar
grammar.explanationSomali: Unit-kan who dadka ayuu sharxayaa; which/that waxyaabaha ayay sharxayaan.
grammar.rule: Unit-kan who dadka ayuu sharxayaa; which/that waxyaabaha ayay sharxayaan.
grammar.sentenceStructure: noun + who/which/that + verb + detail.

positiveExamples.english: The sentence uses “Who” in a simple relative clause that describes a person, thing, or place.
positiveExamples.somali: Jumladda waxay “Who” ku adeegsanaysaa relative clause fudud oo sharxaya qof, shay ama meel.

positiveExamples.english: The sentence uses “Which” in a simple relative clause that describes a person, thing, or place.
positiveExamples.somali: Jumladda waxay “Which” ku adeegsanaysaa relative clause fudud oo sharxaya qof, shay ama meel.

positiveExamples.english: The sentence uses “That” in a simple relative clause that describes a person, thing, or place.
positiveExamples.somali: Jumladda waxay “That” ku adeegsanaysaa relative clause fudud oo sharxaya qof, shay ama meel.

positiveExamples.somali: Jumladda waxay “Neighbour” ku adeegsanaysaa relative clause fudud oo sharxaya qof, shay ama meel.

positiveExamples.somali: Jumladda waxay “Cupboard” ku adeegsanaysaa relative clause fudud oo sharxaya qof, shay ama meel.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Who, Which iyo That • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The sentence uses “Who” in a simple relative clause that describes a person, thing, or place.
lines.somali: Jumladda waxay “Who” ku adeegsanaysaa relative clause fudud oo sharxaya qof, shay ama meel.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Who, Which iyo That • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Isticmaalka Where • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The sentence uses “Where” in a simple relative clause that describes a person, thing, or place.
lines.somali: Jumladda waxay “Where” ku adeegsanaysaa relative clause fudud oo sharxaya qof, shay ama meel.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Isticmaalka Where • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa place descriptions iyo comparisons heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan description ama comparison leh context cad.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be/have + place or comparison detail.

positiveExamples.english: The sports facility includes an indoor court and two changing rooms.
positiveExamples.somali: Tas-hiilaadka ciyaaruhu wuxuu leeyahay garoon gudaha ah iyo laba qol oo dhar lagu beddelo.

positiveExamples.english: The community bus service runs every thirty minutes during the day.
positiveExamples.somali: Adeegga baska bulshadu wuxuu shaqeeyaa soddonkii daqiiqo mar maalintii.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional area guide explains how the Public transport affects daily life in the neighbourhood.
positiveExamples.somali: Hagaha degaanka mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu sharxayaa sida Public transport u saameeyo nolosha maalinlaha ah ee xaafadda.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional area guide explains how the Electricity affects daily life in the neighbourhood.
positiveExamples.somali: Hagaha degaanka mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu sharxayaa sida Electricity u saameeyo nolosha maalinlaha ah ee xaafadda.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional area guide explains how the Water supply affects daily life in the neighbourhood.
positiveExamples.somali: Hagaha degaanka mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu sharxayaa sida Water supply u saameeyo nolosha maalinlaha ah ee xaafadda.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional area guide explains how the Internet access affects daily life in the neighbourhood.
positiveExamples.somali: Hagaha degaanka mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu sharxayaa sida Internet access u saameeyo nolosha maalinlaha ah ee xaafadda.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional area guide explains how the Parking affects daily life in the neighbourhood.
positiveExamples.somali: Hagaha degaanka mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu sharxayaa sida Parking u saameeyo nolosha maalinlaha ah ee xaafadda.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional area guide explains how the Lift affects daily life in the neighbourhood.
positiveExamples.somali: Hagaha degaanka mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu sharxayaa sida Lift u saameeyo nolosha maalinlaha ah ee xaafadda.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Sharaxaadda adeegyada iyo tas-hiilaadka • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The sports facility includes an indoor court and two changing rooms.
lines.somali: Tas-hiilaadka ciyaaruhu wuxuu leeyahay garoon gudaha ah iyo laba qol oo dhar lagu beddelo.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Sharaxaadda adeegyada iyo tas-hiilaadka • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play A2 ah oo ku saabsan Sharaxaadda adeegyada iyo tas-hiilaadka, kuna dar location ama comparison detail cad.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Sharaxaadda adeegyada iyo tas-hiilaadka, adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Sharaxaadda adeegyada iyo tas-hiilaadka, common collocations, grammar-ka lagama maarmaanka ah iyo isticmaalka place/comparison context.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Faa’iidooyinka iyo qasaaraha waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Faa’iidooyinka iyo qasaaraha.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa place descriptions iyo comparisons heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan description ama comparison leh context cad.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be/have + place or comparison detail.

positiveExamples.english: One advantage of the fictional apartment is its central location.
positiveExamples.somali: Mid ka mid ah faa’iidooyinka guriga mala-awaalka ahi waa goobtiisa bartamaha ah.

positiveExamples.english: The main disadvantage is that the fictional building has no parking.
positiveExamples.somali: Qasaaraha ugu weyn waa in dhismaha mala-awaalka ahi uusan lahayn baarkin.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Faa’iidooyinka iyo qasaaraha • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: One advantage of the fictional apartment is its central location.
lines.somali: Mid ka mid ah faa’iidooyinka guriga mala-awaalka ahi waa goobtiisa bartamaha ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Faa’iidooyinka iyo qasaaraha • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Doorashada ikhtiyaarka ugu habboon waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Doorashada ikhtiyaarka ugu habboon.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa place descriptions iyo comparisons heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan description ama comparison leh context cad.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be/have + place or comparison detail.

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Two apartments • mock comparison data

lines.speaker: Data
lines.english: Apartment A: 420 dollars, 55 m², 1 km from centre, furnished, bus stop 100 m, moderate noise. Apartment B: 500 dollars, 72 m², 3 km away, unfurnished, quiet, two bedrooms.
lines.somali: Laba guri: A waa 420 dollar, 55 m², 1 km, alaab leh, bas 100 m, buuq dhexdhexaad. B waa 500 dollar, 72 m², 3 km, alaab la’aan, deggan, laba qol.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: Which option is cheaper, larger, closer, quieter, or better equipped according to the data?
lines.somali: Xogta sida ay sheegtay, kee ayaa jaban, weyn, dhow, deggan ama qalab fiican leh?

lines.speaker: Opinion
lines.english: Choose an option and explain which facts support your preference.
lines.somali: Dooro ikhtiyaar oo sharax xaqiiqooyinka taageeraya doorashadaada.

dialogues.titleSomali: Two neighbourhoods • mock comparison data

lines.speaker: Data
lines.english: Green Area has three bus routes and nearby shops; River Area is quieter but has one bus each hour.
lines.somali: Green Area wuxuu leeyahay saddex bas iyo dukaamo dhow; River Area wuu ka deggan yahay laakiin saacaddii hal bas ayuu leeyahay.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: Which option is cheaper, larger, closer, quieter, or better equipped according to the data?

lines.speaker: Data
lines.english: Route A is 4 km and takes 20 minutes; Route B is 6 km and takes 16 minutes because it avoids the market.
lines.somali: Jidka A waa 4 km oo 20 daqiiqo ah; Jidka B waa 6 km oo 16 daqiiqo ah, sababtoo ah suuqa ayuu ka fogaadaa.

lines.speaker: Data
lines.english: Hotel A costs 35 dollars and has no lift; Hotel B costs 48 dollars and has a lift, breakfast, and parking.
lines.somali: Huteel A waa 35 dollar, wiishna ma leh; Huteel B waa 48 dollar oo leh wiish, quraac iyo baarkin.

lessons.speakingPractice: Kala dooro laba property oo facts-ka iyo preference-ka kala saar.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Doorashada ikhtiyaarka ugu habboon, adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Fahamka khariidadaha iyo calaamadaha waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Fahamka khariidadaha iyo calaamadaha.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa place descriptions iyo comparisons heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan description ama comparison leh context cad.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be/have + place or comparison detail.

positiveExamples.english: Visitors must use the main entrance at the front of the fictional building.
positiveExamples.somali: Booqdayaashu waa inay isticmaalaan albaabka weyn ee ku yaal dhinaca hore ee dhismaha mala-awaalka ah.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional map labels the Exit clearly beside the correct route or public building.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Fictional map • fictional map/sign • comprehension

lines.speaker: Sign
lines.english: Station on West Road; bank opposite Central Park; library next to park; bus stop outside station; visitors use the library’s south entrance.
lines.somali: Khariidad mala-awaal ah: saldhigga West Road; bangiga Central Park ka soo horjeeda; maktabadda beerta ku xigta; boosteejada saldhigga dibaddiisa; booqdayaashu albaabka koonfureed ayay isticmaalaan.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: What location, direction, or instruction does this item communicate?
lines.somali: Goobtee, jiho ama tilmaamtee ayuu shaygani sheegayaa?
