lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play A2 ah oo ku saabsan Fahamka khariidadaha iyo calaamadaha, kuna dar location ama comparison detail cad.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Fahamka khariidadaha iyo calaamadaha, adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Fahamka khariidadaha iyo calaamadaha, common collocations, grammar-ka lagama maarmaanka ah iyo isticmaalka place/comparison context.

quizQuestions.question: Dooro macnaha saxda ah ee “Street”.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “waddo”. Source: Fahamka khariidadaha iyo calaamadaha. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg xeerka iyo example-ka casharkan.

quizQuestions.question: Dooro macnaha saxda ah ee “Junction”.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “isgoys”. Source: Fahamka khariidadaha iyo calaamadaha. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg xeerka iyo example-ka casharkan.

quizQuestions.question: Dooro macnaha saxda ah ee “Landmark”.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “calaamad goobeed”. Source: Fahamka khariidadaha iyo calaamadaha. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg xeerka iyo example-ka casharkan.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Fahamka xayeysiisyada guryaha waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Fahamka xayeysiisyada guryaha.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa place descriptions iyo comparisons heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan description ama comparison leh context cad.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be/have + place or comparison detail.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: City-centre apartment • fictional advertisement

lines.speaker: Advertisement
lines.english: One bedroom, central fictional district, 460 dollars monthly, furnished, lift and internet, shops 200 m away, available 1 October 2026, mock form A.
lines.somali: Guri bartamaha ah: hal qol jiif, 460 dollar bishii, alaab leh, wiish iyo internet, dukaamo 200 m, la heli karo 1 Oktoobar 2026, foom tusaale A.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: What are the rent, rooms, furniture, facilities, distance, and availability date?
lines.somali: Waa maxay kirada, qolalka, alaabta, tas-hiilaadka, masaafadda iyo taariikhda helitaanku?

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Isbarbardhigga guryaha waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Isbarbardhigga guryaha.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa place descriptions iyo comparisons heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso vocabulary-ga casharkan description ama comparison leh context cad.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be/have + place or comparison detail.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Three fictional properties • comparison table

lines.speaker: Property A
lines.english: 420 dollars; one bedroom; 55 m²; furnished; 1 km from centre; bus 100 m; internet; affordable but smaller.
lines.somali: 420 dollar; hal qol; 55 m²; alaab leh; 1 km; bas 100 m; internet; la awoodi karo laakiin yar.

lines.speaker: Property B
lines.english: 500 dollars; two bedrooms; 72 m²; unfurnished; 3 km; bus 400 m; parking; spacious but farther.
lines.somali: 500 dollar; laba qol; 72 m²; alaab la’aan; 3 km; bas 400 m; baarkin; waasac laakiin fog.

lines.speaker: Property C
lines.english: 620 dollars; three bedrooms; 88 m²; furnished; 2 km; station 250 m; lift and security; largest but most expensive.
lines.somali: 620 dollar; saddex qol; 88 m²; alaab leh; 2 km; saldhig 250 m; wiish iyo ammaan; ugu weyn laakiin ugu qaalisan.

lines.speaker: Facts
lines.english: A is the cheapest; C has the most bedrooms; A is closest to transport; B is large enough for a fictional family of four.
lines.somali: A waa ugu jaban; C qolalka ugu badan; A gaadiidka ugu dhow; B qoys tusaale ah oo afar qof ah wuu ku filan yahay.

dialogues.titleSomali: Isbarbardhigga guryaha • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The fictional property card shows Property A beside its price, size, facilities, and availability.
lines.somali: Kaarka guriga mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu Property A ku muujinayaa qiimaha, cabbirka, tas-hiilaadka iyo helitaanka.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Isbarbardhigga guryaha • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Place description • 140–190 words

lines.speaker: Writer
lines.english: My fictional neighbourhood is a mainly residential area about fifteen minutes from the city centre by bus. It is quieter than the central business district, but it still has useful daily services. There is a supermarket, a health clinic, a bakery, and a bus stop within walking distance. The apartment buildings are modern, and most have lifts and secure entrances. A small community centre provides evening classes and a study room where residents can use the internet. The main road becomes crowded in the morning when people travel to work, although the smaller streets are usually peaceful. One advantage of the area is its convenient public transport. Another positive feature is the park, which has a playground and a safe walking path. The main disadvantage is that visitor parking is limited near the larger buildings. Overall, I like the neighbourhood because it is clean, well connected, and not as expensive as the fictional city centre. It offers enough services for everyday life without feeling too busy.
lines.somali: Xaafaddayda mala-awaalka ahi waa deegaan guryo oo baska shan iyo toban daqiiqo uga jira bartamaha. Way ka deggan tahay bartamaha ganacsiga, laakiin waxay leedahay adeegyo muhiim ah. Supermarket, rug caafimaad, foorno iyo bas ayaa lug lagu gaari karaa. Waddada weyn subaxdii way ciriirtaa. Faa’iidada ugu weyn waa gaadiidka ku habboon, qasaaruhuna waa baarkin booqde oo yar.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: What are the main advantage and disadvantage?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada iyo qasaaraha ugu weyn?

lines.speaker: Answer
lines.english: Convenient transport; limited visitor parking.
lines.somali: Gaadiid ku habboon; baarkin booqde oo xaddidan.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista sharaxaad goob • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The writing model includes a clear Location before giving an overall comparison or opinion.
lines.somali: Qaabka qoraalku wuxuu leeyahay Location cad kahor isbarbardhigga ama ra’yiga guud.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista sharaxaad goob • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Comparison paragraph • as-as • too/enough

lines.speaker: Writer
lines.english: Both fictional apartments are near public transport, but Apartment A is closer to the city centre. It is cheaper than Apartment B and has bills included. However, Apartment B is larger, quieter, and more comfortable for a family. Apartment A is not as spacious as Apartment B, while Apartment B is not as convenient for a person who works in the centre. The main difference is the balance between price and space. Apartment A has enough room for one person, but it is too small for four people. Apartment B has two bedrooms and a balcony, although its monthly rent is higher. Overall, Apartment A is the better option for one student, while Apartment B is more suitable for a fictional family that needs extra space.
lines.somali: Labada guri ee mala-awaalka ahi waxay u dhow yihiin gaadiidka. A wuxuu uga dhow yahay bartamaha, waana ka jaban yahay B. B wuu ka weyn yahay oo ka deggan yahay. A qoys afar qof ah kuma filna. Guud ahaan A wuxuu ku habboon yahay hal arday, B-na qoys u baahan meel dheeraad ah.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: Which facts support each option?
lines.somali: Xaqiiqooyinkee taageeraya ikhtiyaar kasta?

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista paragraph isbarbardhig ah • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The writing model includes a clear Both before giving an overall comparison or opinion.
lines.somali: Qaabka qoraalku wuxuu leeyahay Both cad kahor isbarbardhigga ama ra’yiga guud.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista paragraph isbarbardhig ah • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Akhrinta hagaha deegaanka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Akhrinta hagaha deegaanka.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Harbour View local guide • 210–290 words

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.english: Harbour View is a fictional coastal district about four kilometres from the centre of Bright Town. It is connected to the centre by two bus routes, and the journey usually takes twenty minutes. The busiest area is Market Square, where local shops, a pharmacy, and a bakery open from early morning. Market Square can become crowded after four o’clock, but the streets near the coast are quieter and more peaceful. Most daily services are within walking distance of the main residential area. There is a clinic beside the library, a community centre opposite Central Park, and a sports facility behind the bus station. The community centre is a place where residents attend evening classes and use free study rooms. Harbour View has become better connected since a new bus stop opened near the park. One advantage of the district is its walking route along the coast, which is popular in the early evening. The main disadvantage is limited parking near Market Square. Visitors who arrive by bus should get off at Central Park and walk past the library towards the coast. The area is not as expensive as the fictional town centre, although homes with a sea view cost more than inland ones. Harbour View is a convenient option for residents who want useful services and quieter streets. Visitors may enjoy the coastal path, but they should avoid Market Square during its busiest hour.
lines.somali: Harbour View waa degmo xeebeed mala-awaal ah oo afar kiiloomitir u jirta bartamaha Bright Town. Laba bas ayaa isku xira. Market Square waa meesha ugu mashquulka badan, laakiin waddooyinka xeebtu way ka deggan yihiin. Adeegyada badankood lug ayaa lagu gaari karaa. Faa’iidada ugu weyn waa jidka socodka xeebta; qasaaruhuna waa baarkin yar. Guriyadu kama qaalisna sida bartamaha, inkastoo kuwa badda eegaa qaali yihiin.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: Where should bus visitors get off, and which area is busiest?
lines.somali: Halkee ayay booqdayaasha basku ka degayaan, aaggeese ugu mashquul badan?

lines.speaker: Answer
lines.english: At Central Park; Market Square is busiest.
lines.somali: Central Park; Market Square ayaa ugu mashquul badan.

dialogues.titleSomali: Akhrinta hagaha deegaanka • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The local-area reading uses Local area guide to guide fictional visitors and residents.
lines.somali: Qoraalka hagaha deegaanku wuxuu Local area guide u adeegsadaa hagidda booqdayaasha iyo dadka deggan ee mala-awaalka ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Akhrinta hagaha deegaanka • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Wada sheekeysiyada goobaha.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Common Place and Comparison Mistakes grammar
grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu saxayaa there are, furniture, prepositions, comparisons, enough iyo relative clauses.
grammar.rule: Casharku wuxuu saxayaa there are, furniture, prepositions, comparisons, enough iyo relative clauses.
grammar.sentenceStructure: correct place/comparison form + clear context.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The correction task presents “There are two rooms” as the natural form in a clear place or comparison context.
lines.somali: Layliga sixiddu wuxuu “There are two rooms” u soo bandhigayaa qaabka dabiiciga ah ee place ama comparison context cad.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 10 waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples goobeed oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Dib-u-eegista Unit 10.
Adeegso place/comparison grammar-ka context cad.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

negativeExamples.english: There isn’t enough parking near the fictional building.
negativeExamples.somali: Baarkin ku filan kama jiro dhismaha mala-awaalka ah agtiisa.

negativeExamples.english: The side road is not as busy as the main road.
negativeExamples.somali: Waddada dhinacu uma mashquul badna sida waddada weyn.

questionExamples.english: Is there a supermarket near the fictional apartment?
questionExamples.somali: Supermarket ma u dhow yahay guriga mala-awaalka ah?

questionExamples.english: Which property is more convenient for the example family?
questionExamples.somali: Gurigee ayaa qoyska tusaalaha ah uga habboon?

commonMistakesSomali: Furniture waa uncountable.
Ha isku darin more iyo -er ama most iyo -est.
Relative-clause question-ka u dooro answer aan ambiguous ahayn.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 10 • description • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you describe this fictional place for me?
lines.somali: Ma ii sharxi kartaa goobtan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The Unit 10 review connects Homes review with a practical place-description task.
lines.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 10 waxay Homes review ku xiraysaa hawl sharaxaad goob oo wax-ku-ool ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is the main advantage of the location?
lines.somali: Waa maxay faa’iidada ugu weyn ee goobtu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Daily services are nearby, although the main road can be noisy.
lines.somali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ahi way dhow yihiin, inkastoo waddada weyn buuq yeelan karto.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 10 • comparison • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Which fictional option would you choose?
lines.somali: Ikhtiyaarkee mala-awaalka ah ayaad dooran lahayd?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I would choose the quieter one because it is close enough to public transport.
lines.somali: Waxaan dooran lahaa kan ka deggan, sababtoo ah gaadiidka dadweynaha ayuu ugu dhow yahay si ku filan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is it more expensive than the other one?
lines.somali: Miyuu ka qaalisan yahay kan kale?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but it has better facilities and enough space.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin wuxuu leeyahay tas-hiilaad fiican iyo meel ku filan.
